title: BEM-603 intake diagnostics
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_path=Path('governance/state/operator_reply_intake_state.json')
result_path=Path('governance/reports/operator_reply_intake_result.md')
workflow=Path('.github/workflows/operator-reply-intake.yml')
trigger=Path('governance/triggers/operator_reply_intake.trigger')
script=Path('scripts/operator_reply_intake.py')
decisions=Path('governance/operator_decisions')
state={}
if state_path.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(state_path.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={'parse_error':True,'raw':state_path.read_text(errors='ignore')[:2000]}
last=state.get('last_run') if isinstance(state,dict) else None
decision_files=[str(p) for p in sorted(decisions.glob('*.json'), key=lambda p: str(p))] if decisions.exists() else []
status='unknown'
blocker=None
if isinstance(last,dict):
    status=last.get('status') or 'unknown'
    blocker=last.get('blocker')
else:
    status='no_live_state_yet'
    blocker={'code':'REPLY_INTAKE_LIVE_STATE_NOT_FOUND','message':'operator_reply_intake_state.json or last_run not present after trigger; workflow may still be running or did not commit.'}
# Existing decision file means operator decision is safe, but live intake can still be diagnostic-only.
report_lines=['# BEM-603 | Reply Intake Live Diagnostics','', 'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 05:58 (UTC+3)', '', '## Files', '- workflow exists: '+str(workflow.exists()), '- script exists: '+str(script.exists()), '- trigger exists: '+str(trigger.exists()), '- state exists: '+str(state_path.exists()), '- result report exists: '+str(result_path.exists()), '', '## Last run', json.dumps(last,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2) if isinstance(last,dict) else str(last), '', '## Decision files', json.dumps(decision_files,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2), '', '## Status', status, '', '## Blocker', 'null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)]
report=reports/'bem603_reply_intake_live_diagnostics.md'
report.write_text(sep.join(report_lines)+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem603_reply_intake_live_diagnostics','cycle_id':'bem603-reply-intake-live-diagnostics','source':'gpt','status':status,'last_run':last,'decision_files':decision_files,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 05:58 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state2={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state2=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state2={}
state2['bem603_reply_intake_live_diagnostics']={'status':status,'last_run':last,'decision_files':decision_files,'blocker':blocker}
state2['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 05:58 (UTC+3)'; state2['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state2,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem603_reply_intake_live_diagnostics.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-603 status='+status+' blocker='+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Recorded live diagnostics for hardened operator reply intake')
"""
No issue comments.
